listings.desc: Upgraded 4th-floor corner unit at Merritt Towers overlooks Sykes Creek and Newfound Harbor. Remodeled kitchen and baths, oak hardwood floors, enclosed balcony. HOA covers cable, internet, water, trash, insurance and grounds.

Stunning 3BR corner/end unit with direct water views of Sykes Creek. Gigantic wrap-around balcony, remodeled kitchen with granite counters, plantation shutters, tile floors throughout. HVAC 2024, covered carport.
